body.title: T-worker-queue: Queue-driven worker — pulls tickets via MCP, no keyboard injection
body.result: Shipped 2026-04-19 audit. Worker daemon at lab/claudecode/worker_daemon.sh polls cc_queue every 20s, spawns 'claude /sprint <id>' subprocess per ticket — no xdotool, no keyboard injection. Queue CLI (cc_queue.py) has worker-launch verb. Commits 1d635d89, 9bfb5e5a.
body.description: GitHub issue #286. Imported from GH audit — needs triage.
